label: PMID_38745351
journal: Journal of Agricultural and Food Chemistry
title: Gut Microbiota Mediate the Neuroprotective Effect of Oolong Tea Polyphenols in Cognitive Impairment Induced by Circadian Rhythm Disorder

label: PMID_38745351_R1
claim_text_raw: OTP relieved microglia activation, reduced LPS and glutamate-related neurotoxicity, increased SCFAs, upregulated Muribaculaceae and Clostridia_UCG-014, downregulated Desulfovibrio, and improved synaptic plasticity markers including BDNF, PSD-95, and SYN.

label: PMID_39153277_R1
claim_text_raw: YTP altered colonic bile-acid composition, increased conjugated and non-12OH bile acids, decreased FXR, FGF15, FGFR4, and ASBT, increased Cyp7a1 and Cyp27a1, and inhibited hepatic cholesterol accumulation in NAFLD mice.

label: Muribaculaceae; Pseudomonas; acterium_coprostanoligenes_group; Clostridiales; Lachnospiraceae_NK4A136_group; Delftia; Dubosiella; Romboutsia
conjugated bile acids; non-12OH bile acids
PMID_39153277_R2
claim_text_raw: YTP reshaped the intestinal microbiome by decreasing BSH-producing genera and increasing taurine-metabolism genera, with multiple genera strongly correlated with specific bile-acid monomers.

label: PMID_39479919
title: Inhibitory effect of tea flower polysaccharides on oxidative stress and microglial oxidative damage in aging mice by regulating gut microbiota

label: PMID_39479919_R2
claim_text_raw: TFPS reduced excessive hippocampal microglial activation, down-regulated IL-6 IL-1beta TNF-alpha and NF-kB, and alleviated neuroinflammation in aging mice while regulating gut microbiota.
